race.comment: GLASS OF ROSE (1) has been plying her trade in much tougher contests at the past couple and should find this assignment much easier. Boasts a win over this track and trip and gets some well-needed weight relief with the 3kg claim. Watch for a spike in form. BOLLINGER MISS (2) is a two-time winner around this circuit and gets the services of Maloney in the saddle. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be featuring in the finish. HELLARIOUS (9) has put back-to-back victories together and is racing high on confidence of late. Hard to knock mares in form. VOODOO LASS (4) best of the rest while fresh.
